info.title: RPGays Orchestration API
info.description: Same-origin HTTP contract. Realtime events are invalidation hints only.

200.description: The Control secret was confirmed for high-risk changes.

ParticipantJoinResponse.description: New participant session and resume token.

ParticipantRosterResponse.description: Pinned campaign roster available to the participant.

ParticipantPlayerGroupsResponse.description: Groups visible to the current Player.

ParticipantMessagesResponse.description: Messages visible to the current participant.

ParticipantPollsResponse.description: Polls visible to the current participant.

ParticipantPollMutationResponse.description: Updated or replayed participant poll vote.

ParticipantRollsResponse.description: Rolls visible to the current participant.

ParticipantRollPresetsResponse.description: Dice presets available to the current participant.

ParticipantNpcsResponse.description: NPCs revealed to the current participant.

ParticipantNpcNoteMutationResponse.description: Created, changed, or deleted NPC note.

ParticipantMapStateResponse.description: Current Player map state and participant-safe snapshot.

PresentationPairResponse.description: Presentation display paired to a live session.

StalePresentationStateResponse.description: The display reported against a stale presentation revision.

ControlCampaignMutationResponse.description: Created, changed, archived, or imported campaign draft.

StaleControlCampaignResponse.description: The campaign draft changed before this command could be applied.

ControlCampaignRevisionsResponse.description: Immutable revision history for a campaign.

ControlCampaignAssetsResponse.description: Campaign assets including failed and archived uploads.

ControlAssetUploadInitiationResponse.description: Initiated asset plus pre-signed multipart part URLs.

ControlMapFogMaskResponse.description: Optional authored fog mask for a map.

ControlMapFogMaskMutationResponse.description: Created, changed, or replayed map fog mask.

ControlAudioCuesResponse.description: Authored audio cues for a campaign.

ControlVideoCuesResponse.description: Authored video cues for a campaign.

ControlDicePresetsResponse.description: Authored dice presets for a campaign.

ControlStagePresetsResponse.description: Authored stage presets for a campaign.

ControlStagePresetEntriesResponse.description: NPC entries in a stage preset.

ControlStagePresetEntryMutationResponse.description: Created or replayed stage preset entry.

ControlPlayerCharactersResponse.description: Authored player characters for a campaign.

ControlNpcStatesResponse.description: Authored appearance states for an NPC.

ControlNpcStateMutationResponse.description: Created or replayed NPC appearance state.

package.description: ZIP campaign revision package, maximum 500 MiB.

player_character_id.description: Required for pc tokens; otherwise omitted.

npc_id.description: Required for npc tokens; otherwise omitted.

asset_id.description: Required for custom tokens; otherwise omitted.

label.description: Required and nonblank for custom tokens; otherwise omitted.
